name: Add ledger count subcommand (guardrail: self-contained, no memory required)
prompt: Add a `count` subcommand to the ledger CLI that prints the number of entries as a single JSON object with a `count` key (e.g. `{"count": 3}`) to stdout. Exit 0 on success. Make minimal, maintainable changes that keep existing behavior and tests passing.

requirements.description: count on empty store exits 0 and prints {"count": 0}
count reflects number of entries after adds
